target_sites.name: mlbprediction
target_sites.angle: Analytics, advanced stats (xBA, WAR, xFIP), data-driven

target_sites.name: bestmlbhandicapper

news_items.headline: Reds put Brandon Williamson on 15-day IL with shoulder fatigue
news_items.description: The Cincinnati Reds placed left-handed starter Brandon Williamson on the 15-day injured list with left shoulder fatigue after undergoing an MRI on Thursday morning.

news_items.headline: CF Luis Robert Jr. (back) latest Mets position player to go on IL
news_items.description: The Mets placed center fielder Luis Robert Jr. on the injured list Thursday morning with lumbar spine disk herniation.

news_items.headline: Trout remains in top-10 form? Stewart takes home NL rookie honors? Don't be surprised!
news_items.description: Eric Karabell looks into the crystal ball to tell fantasy baseball managers what might come to pass in the not-too-distant future.

news_items.headline: ESPN fantasy baseball rankings: 2026 category and roto leagues
news_items.description: Here are Eric Karabell's rankings for ESPN head-to-head category and rotisserie leagues for the remainder of the season.

news_items.headline: Fantasy baseball forecaster: Team hitting ratings
news_items.description: Stay ahead of the game and optimize your fantasy baseball hitters with our forecaster, which provides a rolling 10-day outlook of every team's hitting matchups as well as the potential for stolen bases.

news_items.headline: Fantasy baseball forecaster: Pitcher projections for the next 10 days
news_items.description: Keep up to date on who is pitching -- and how well they're expected to do -- with our forecaster, which provides a rolling 10-day outlook of every team's probable starting pitchers with game score projections.
